title: Sub Item Layers
excerpt:

posts.author: JulesB (Jules )
posts.cookedHtml:
Sub Item layers or sub - sub items.

My team is finding that for our more advanced boards, they require a second layer of sub items. We need to be able to breakdown tasks into more than one bracket. I don’t think it needs to be unlimited, but even one more layer would dramatically improve the functionality of tasks and projects.

For example:
Item: Product XYZ
Sub Item: Colorways XYZ
Sub Sub Item: SKU XYZ

Please don’t recommend the unlimited sub items app, this app does not function well with the platform. Monday has done a tremendous job giving us lots of cool column types, this app isn’t compatible with most of the columns. Even simple columns like a timeline isn’t compatible with this app. The app lags, it creates a second board for mapping, etc.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
‘Sub/sub items’ are on the roadmap for later this year from what I’ve seen. What’s your use case for needing it to be another subitem vs having the sku in a column on that subitem? Maybe I can help you come up with some other ways?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
